style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: a massive medieval war horse with crimson fire-colored coat, golden glowing eyes, nostrils venting dark smoke, carrying a black-armored silhouetted rider holding a broad sword
subject.focal_point: the horse's burning crimson coat and molten gold eyes
subject.secondary: Mane made of living sparks, hooves strike earth creating ember bursts, rider faceless inside black helmet

composition.rule: low-angle hero shot, rule of thirds
composition.foreground: horse and rider in vivid crimson, gold, blackened steel
composition.midground: cracked battlefield earth with scattered embers
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white battlefield with faded banners

lighting.key_light: harsh dusk glow from right illuminating coat
lighting.rim_light: gold rim on armor and eyes

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: heavy 35mm grain, fire and ash particles

symbolism.primary: the second horseman of Apocalypse 6:4 riding out
symbolism.secondary: the horse as pyrrhos, color of war-fire

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
